backstory.original: Jamilah is a Human Barbarian, played by actor (and part time DM) Deborah Ann Woll, and the second brand-new Force Grey character added this season. Shipwrecked as a young child, Jamilah washed up on the shores of Chult. Luckily, the people of this forbidding land took her in and raised her as one of their own. Having grown into a strong and confident young woman, she now longs to leave Chult and explore other lands, challenging anyone along her way to arm wrestling or thigh crushing contests of might.
backstory.display: 嘉米拉是个人类野蛮人，由演员（兼职 DM）Deborah Ann Woll 扮演，是灰色小队本季加入的第二个全新角色。嘉米拉在年幼时遭遇船难，被冲到了楚尔特海岸。幸运的是这片禁忌之地的人们接纳了她，将她作为亲人抚养，如今她已经成长为一个强壮而自信的姑娘。她渴望离开楚尔特，探索其他土地，向沿途遇上的任何人发起挑战，进行掰手腕或压大腿的力量对决。

description.original: Jamilah attacks the closest enemy. If more enemies are nearby, she attacks up to 2 of them and reduces her base and ultimate c/ds by 2 secs.
description.display: 嘉米拉攻击距离最近的敌人。如果附近还有更多敌人，她会攻击最多 2 名敌人，并使她的基本攻击和杀招冷却时间减少 2 秒。

description.original: Jamilah leaps quickly from enemy to enemy, swinging her greatsword.
description.display: 嘉米拉挥舞大剑，迅速从一名敌人跳向另一名敌人。

longDescription.original: Jamilah leaps quickly from enemy to enemy, swinging her greatsword through them in a feat of strength and agility. She hits 6 times in total.
longDescription.display: 嘉米拉以无比的力量和敏捷迅速从一名敌人跳向另一名敌人，并挥舞大剑进行总共 6 次攻击。

description.desc: Increase $source's health by $amount, plus $percent% of the max Health of each Tank Champion they are adjacent to
$source的生命值提升 $amount 加上与其相邻的每位坦克勇士最大生命值的 $percent%
Increase $source's damage by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Tank Champion she is adjacent to
每与一位坦克勇士相邻，则为$source提升 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害

tipText.original: Jamilah's damage is increased when she's near tanks. Put her near the front of your formation to take advantage of this.
tipText.display: 嘉米拉靠近坦克时伤害提高。将她放置在阵型前方从而利用此效果。

description.desc: Increase $source's damage by up to $amount%, based on how many temporary hit points they currently have (max value at 2x max health)
提升$source的伤害，最高可至 $amount%，提升数值基于其当前拥有的临时生命值（提升数值最多为 2 倍最大生命值）

tipText.original: Jamilah's damage is increased dramatically when she has a temporary hit point shield on her. Pair her with Champions that shield!
tipText.display: 嘉米拉获得临时的生命值护盾时，她的伤害会大幅提高。为她搭配会施放护盾的勇士！

specializationDescription.original: Jamilah increases her synergy with your front-line tanks to become an even bigger threat.
specializationDescription.display: 嘉米拉加强与前线坦克的配合，从而成为更可怕的威胁。

specializationDescription.original: Jamilah gains even more confidence when under the protection of a temporary hit point shield.
specializationDescription.display: 嘉米拉获得临时生命值护盾的时候信心猛增。

description.desc: Increase $source's damage by $amount% for each enemy attacking $source or an adjacent Champion.
每有一名敌人正在攻击$source或与其相邻的勇士，即为$source提升 $amount% 伤害

description.original: The taverns of Chult trained me for this day.
description.display: 楚尔特的酒馆训练了我，就为了这一天。

description.original: The only weapon I need is my mind. Also my sword.
description.display: 我唯一需要的武器就是我的大脑，还有我的剑。

description.original: I shall charge into battle with my sword swinging.
description.display: 我将挥舞利剑，冲锋进入战场。

description.original: It couldn't hurt to be more agile.
Perhaps I'm a little rough around the edges.
It's easy to get overwhelmed in the heat of battle.
description.display: 在激烈战斗中很容易被压制。

description.original: If I'm going to be up front, I won't fear my enemies.
description.display: 如果我要站前面，我不会害怕我的敌人。
